channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Ukrainian marine drone explodes at Romanian port
item.description: A malfunctioning Ukrainian naval drone has caused an explosion at a key Black Sea port in Romania.

item.title: How the US naval blockade has bled Iran of nearly $6bn in oil revenues
item.description: Iran is exporting less than one-sixth of the oil it was shipping before the war began.

item.title: Drone explosion in Romanian port spurs Ukraine war spillover fears
item.description: European Commission president warns that the maritime drone attack was a 'direct consequence' of the Russia-Ukraine war.

item.title: Inside Syria’s fight against the Captagon trade
item.description: Anti-narcotics units in Syria raid homes and seize pills as the government fights back against the Captagon trade.

item.title: Nazi salutes, Sikhs abused: Tensions soar in UK after Henry Nowak’s murder
item.description: Although the killed teen's father has warned against exploiting his family's tragedy, far-right groups are rallying.

item.title: Mexico World Cup 2026 preview: Players to watch, group matches and squad
item.description: El Tri lost in the last 16 in seven consecutive World Cups but have higher hopes for the 2026 tournament.

item.title: South Korean police break up 35-hour polling station protest
item.description: South Korean police break up 35-hour polling station protest

item.title: UN boosts Lebanon aid appeal as Israeli war drives humanitarian crisis
item.description: The UN says it needs nearly $640m to help Lebanon over the next six months.

item.title: Hamas says won’t surrender arms but only police will carry weapons in Gaza
item.description: Hamas official Husam Badran, in an exclusive interview, lays out what the group is ready to do ahead of Cairo talks.

item.title: Shakira and Burna Boy opening World Cup in Mexico, Katy Perry headlines US
item.description: Katy Perry will front the opening US World Cup game, while Alanis Morissette and Michael Buble will open Canada's games.

item.title: US-Iran war pushing millions into food crisis, warns UN
item.description: WFP warns that the war is causing substantial increases in food prices in a number of countries.

item.title: Ranking the World Cup 2026 groups: Which teams are favourites to progress?
item.description: The first stage of the 2026 World Cup 2026 features 12 groups. We've ranked them and picked the favourites to advance.

item.title: IAEA brokers Ukraine ceasefire to allow nuclear plant repairs
item.description: Concerns over the safety of the Zaporizhzhia plant, Europe's largest, have been rife throughout Russia's war on Ukraine.

item.title: Zelenskyy asks Putin for meeting: What’s he offering, could Russia accept?
item.description: Russia and Ukraine have been holding peace talks since the war began in 2022, but with no concrete outcome.

item.title: How the world failed a mother’s children, killed in Israeli strikes on Gaza
item.description: How the world failed a mother’s children, killed in Israeli strikes on Gaza

item.title: Thousands protest in Albania over Kushner-linked resort project
item.description: Thousands protest in Albania over Kushner-linked resort project.

item.title: US visa rejections, war on Iran keep fans away from World Cup
item.description: High visa application fees, equally high rejection rates, an unwelcoming America, and the war combine to deter fans.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 talking points: NFL-style half-time show, kits and more
item.description: Al Jazeera breaks down the key talking points ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026 which kicks off next week.

item.title: Iran beat Mali in final warm-up before heading to World Cup
item.description: Iran beat Mali in their final competitive match before departing for their Mexico base for the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: US raises pressure on Cuba as it sanctions President Diaz-Canel
item.description: Measures come as Cuba continues to experience food shortages and blackouts.

item.title: Sooryavanshi in line for T20 call as India fast-track 15-year-old to top
item.description: Following his run topping display at the IPL, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is being lined up as India's youngest player.

item.title: Putin says ‘too early’ to talk about staying in power until 2036
item.description: Putin says ‘too early’ to talk about staying in power until 2036.

item.title: French-Iranian Persepolis author Marjane Satrapi dies of ‘sadness’
item.description: Satrapi's autobiographical novel was born from her experiences of Iran's Islamic revolution and war with Iraq.

item.title: Fireball seen after explosion at Mexico gas facility
item.description: Fireball seen after explosion at Mexico gas facility

item.title: UN envoys call on Trump to stop Israeli annexation
item.description: UN envoys call on Trump to stop Israeli annexation
